The ReadyStack Approach

Enterprise-grade web, M365 and security
practices, priced for small business.

Most small business websites are built once, launched in a hurry, and quietly break over the next two years. Forms stop sending. SSL certificates lapse. Plugins bloat. Search rankings slip. Meanwhile, email deliverability suffers because SPF, DKIM and DMARC were never configured, and Microsoft 365 sits insecure with no MFA enforced and no hardening applied.

ReadyStack Digital was built to fix that pattern. We combine the same technical practices large organisations use — static-first website architecture, proper DNS and email authentication, Microsoft 365 hardening, Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 alignment, and monitored monthly care — and apply them to small businesses at small business prices. Sydney-based, Australia-wide.

Built right the first time

Fast static-first websites with HTTPS, clean DNS, schema markup, and no unnecessary plugins. Microsoft 365 tenants configured properly — custom domain, MFA enforced, Teams and OneDrive set up — from the very first day.

Secured by default

SPF, DKIM, DMARC and MTA-STS configured so your email lands in the inbox. Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 controls applied to your Microsoft 365 environment — application control, patching baselines, hardened tenant, conditional access. The security work most providers skip.

Managed for the long term

Monthly care that actually checks things: website hosting, domain renewal, SSL, form delivery, Microsoft 365 user lifecycle, MFA review, DMARC reports, and Essential Eight monitoring. Real maintenance across your full digital stack — not an invoice in exchange for silence.

Get a Quote

What We Do

Secure digital foundations for
Australian small businesses.

ReadyStack Digital combines enterprise-grade web, Microsoft 365, and cyber security practices into one simple offering — website, business email, Essential Eight alignment, and ongoing managed care, all priced for small business.

Online Presence

SMB Online Presence

Fast, mobile-friendly, SEO-ready websites with domain, hosting, SSL, contact forms, WhatsApp/call buttons, schema markup, and Google Search Console setup — everything a local business needs to look professional online.

New Service

Microsoft 365 for Small Business

Professional Microsoft 365 setup for your business — tenant configuration, custom domain, business email with proper MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC records, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint basics, and MFA enforced from day one.

Microsoft 365Business EmailMFATeamsOneDrive

Cyber Security

Essential Eight Alignment for SMBs

Practical Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 setup for Australian small businesses — application control basics, patching, MFA, restrict admin privileges, and configurable Microsoft 365 hardening. Suitable for SMBs needing to demonstrate cyber security maturity for clients, insurance, or government tenders.

Essential EightML1MFAPatchingHardeningACSC-aligned

Email Security

Email Security & Domain Protection

Proper SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and MTA-STS records configured for your domain so your emails reach the inbox and your domain identity is protected from spoofing. DMARC monitoring and reports included.

SPFDKIMDMARCMTA-STSDMARC reports

How It Works

How ReadyStack Digital gets
your website live
and keeps it managed.

01
Step 1

Tell Us About Your Business

We collect your business details, services, branding, contact information, domain needs, email requirements, SEO goals, and website priorities.

Intake brief complete
02
Step 2

We Plan the Website

We map the page structure, key sections, calls to action, contact flow, domain setup, business email option, SEO basics, and monthly care requirements.

Sitemap & scope confirmed
03
Step 3

We Build and Configure

We design the website, connect hosting, configure forms, prepare SEO basics, set up secure HTTPS, review DNS, and support professional business email setup if selected.

Website ready to review
04
Step 4

You Review

You check the website before launch and request final adjustments. We keep the process practical, focused, and aligned with your business goals.

Launch approved
05
Ongoing

We Launch and Manage

Your website goes live, then monthly care keeps the technical side handled with hosting, domain checks, SSL monitoring, form testing, basic SEO checks, and small updates.

Monthly care active
Secure Online Presence

Secure website, email and domain foundations
handled properly from the start.

Security does not need to be complicated for most local business websites, but the basics must be done properly. ReadyStack Digital keeps your setup lean, secure and easier to maintain by using HTTPS, secure hosting, DNS checks, form testing, email authentication records and a static-first website approach where suitable.

Your business gets a professional online presence that customers can trust, while you avoid unnecessary plugins, risky admin logins and confusing technical maintenance.

Website Security

SSL and HTTPS

Your website is launched with a secure connection so visitors can access it through HTTPS.

Email Trust

SPF, DKIM and DMARC

Professional business email can be configured with the records that help protect your domain identity.

Lean Setup

Fewer moving parts

Where suitable, we avoid unnecessary plugins, dashboards and login systems that add maintenance risk.

Packages

Transparent packages for websites
and Microsoft 365.

Start with a one-time build package, then keep everything managed with a monthly care plan. All packages priced upfront — no hidden fees, no surprise invoices. Add-ons available and quoted before any work begins.

Website Build

Online Presence Starter

from $ 1,000 upfront

A clean, professional one-page website that explains your services and generates enquiries. Typical builds with add-ons range $1,500–$2,500.

  • One-page website design and build
  • Mobile-friendly and fast-loading
  • Domain setup and hosting connection
  • SSL and HTTPS setup
  • Contact form setup
  • Phone, email and WhatsApp buttons
  • Basic SEO setup with schema markup
  • Google Search Console setup
  • Launch support

Add-ons & Extras
Add-on

Extra pages

Additional service, about, location or industry-specific pages. Quoted per page based on scope and content.

Add-on

Essential Eight alignment

Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 setup including Intune device baseline, conditional access, hardened M365 tenant and application control. Quoted based on scope.

Add-on

Content writing

Page copy written for your services and audience, structured for clear messaging and basic SEO. Quoted per page.

Add-on

Logo and brand basics

A simple logo, colour palette and font pairing if you don't already have a visual identity. Quoted as a fixed package.

Add-on

DMARC monitoring

Ongoing DMARC report analysis and domain protection monitoring — included in Website + M365 Care or available as a standalone add-on.

Quoted separately

Custom features

Booking systems, advanced SEO campaigns, automations, integrations and other custom requirements quoted upfront based on scope.

Online Presence

Build trust online
without adding more work to your day.

A good website should help customers understand your services, trust your business and contact you easily. ReadyStack Digital connects the key pieces: website, domain, email, SEO setup, contact forms and monthly care.

Trust

Look more professional

A clean website and professional business email make your business look established, consistent and easier to trust.

Enquiries

Make contact easy

Contact forms, phone links, email buttons and WhatsApp CTAs make it easier for customers to reach you.

Visibility

Help Google understand your site

Basic SEO setup, sitemap, Search Console and clean page structure give your website a proper foundation.

FAQs

Common questions before we build.

ReadyStack Digital focuses on small businesses across Australia, including service providers, consultants, trades, recruitment businesses, clinics, restaurants and other businesses that need a professional online presence and secure digital foundations.

Not always. Most small businesses only need a fast, professional website with contact forms, SEO setup, secure hosting, domain connection and monthly care. We only recommend WordPress if your business specifically needs full website editing or plugin-heavy features.

The Essential Eight is a set of cyber security mitigation strategies published by the Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC). It is not a regulatory requirement for most small businesses, but it is increasingly requested by enterprise clients, government agencies, and insurers as evidence of baseline cyber security maturity. If you are bidding on government work, renewing a cyber insurance policy, or onboarding corporate clients, demonstrating Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 alignment can be a genuine business requirement.

Yes. Our Microsoft 365 for Small Business service covers everything from creating a new tenant to configuring your custom domain, setting up business email with proper MX, SPF, DKIM and DMARC records, enabling Microsoft Teams, OneDrive and SharePoint basics, and enforcing MFA across all accounts. We can also migrate from an existing email provider if needed.

Online Presence + M365 gives you a professional website and a properly configured Microsoft 365 tenant with business email, MFA, Teams and OneDrive. Secure SMB Foundation builds on that by adding Essential Eight Maturity Level 1 controls — Intune device baseline, conditional access policies, application control basics, restricted admin privileges, and a hardened M365 tenant. Choose Secure SMB Foundation if you need to demonstrate formal cyber security maturity for clients, insurers, or government tenders.

Not always — but increasingly yes. The trigger is usually external: a corporate client's supplier requirements, a government tender panel that asks for evidence of cyber security posture, or a cyber insurance renewal where the insurer wants to see baseline controls. If none of those apply to your business right now, the Online Presence Starter or Online Presence + M365 packages are likely sufficient, with the option to uplift later.

Yes. Every website includes basic SEO setup, including page titles, meta descriptions, sitemap, heading structure, image alt text, schema markup and Google Search Console setup.

Yes. We can help register or connect your domain, configure DNS, connect hosting, manage SSL and keep the technical setup monitored through monthly care.

Business email is included in the Online Presence + M365 and Secure SMB Foundation packages. It is also available as a standalone service through our Microsoft 365 for Small Business or Email Security & Domain Protection offerings. All email setups include proper MX, SPF, DKIM and DMARC records.

Yes. We include secure website foundations such as HTTPS, SSL checks, secure hosting setup, DNS checks and form testing. Where suitable, we use lightweight static websites to reduce unnecessary plugin and admin-login risks.

Monthly care is available at three tiers. Website Care ($100/month) covers hosting, domain and DNS checks, SSL monitoring, form testing and basic SEO monitoring. Website + M365 Care ($300/month) adds M365 user lifecycle management, MFA review, DMARC reports and a monthly security review. Full Stack Care ($600/month) adds Essential Eight monitoring, a monthly security report and priority support.

No. Monthly care includes small updates only. Larger design changes, new pages, copywriting, SEO campaigns or custom features are quoted separately.

ReadyStack Digital Sydney-based · Australia-wide

ReadyStack Digital is a Sydney-based agency building secure digital foundations for Australian small businesses. Services include website design, Microsoft 365 setup, Essential Eight alignment, email security (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and monthly managed care across the full digital stack.
